description.line1: Passionate developer with over 15 years of experience in IT.
description.line2: Transitioned to development 4 years ago, driven by my passion for digital and discovering code.
description.line3: My unique journey, starting as a helpdesk technician and evolving into system and network administration, has given me a global vision of information systems.
description.line4: As a freelancer, I particularly focus on Clean Code principles and craft development practices.

paragraphs.p1: Passionate developer with over 15 years of experience in IT, I transitioned to development 4 years ago, driven by my passion for digital and discovering code and Software Craftsmanship best practices.
paragraphs.p2: My unique journey, starting as a helpdesk technician and evolving into system and network administration, has given me a holistic view of information systems. This experience enriches my development practice, allowing me to approach projects as a whole, from infrastructure to code.
paragraphs.p3: As a freelancer, I particularly focus on Clean Code principles and craft development practices. I firmly believe that code quality and long-term maintainability are as important as immediate functionality.
paragraphs.p4: My dual technical expertise — infrastructure and development — allows me to bring unique added value to projects, combining technical robustness and code excellence.

mgm.title: MGM — Performance Management
mgm.description: Mobile application allowing sales teams to track their performance in real time, visualise top products and analyse weekly trends.

fcs.title: FCS
fcs.description: Mobile application for evaluating customer satisfaction at a granular business 'family' level.

stic.title: STIC
stic.description: Mobile application for scanning cycle registrations to associate them with customers.

winky.title: Winkyverse
winky.description: Website for managing and purchasing tokens during the Winky project ICO.

rsb.title: RSB — Return to Shelf
rsb.description: Project qualification addressing resource challenges in the shelf-stocking process at Decathlon stores. Each step requires time and human resources, from receiving goods, unpacking, sorting to shelving. The project aims to optimally plan human resources at key stages within an ideal timeline.

mc.title: Managers Companion
mc.description: Application meeting the needs of store managers, from store directors to department heads. Its objective is threefold: performance analysis, self-assessment on commercial policies, RSB, shelf efficiency and business volume management, and actions based on product opportunities to highlight. Integration of an AI layer with agentic architecture across all application layers.
